name: @pawsmemories/blender-agent
description: Multi-agent Blender avatar builder: perceive → reason → act → verify

scripts.test-bridge: tsx -e "import { BlenderTCPClient } from './tools/blender_client.js'; const c = new BlenderTCPClient(); c.ping().then(r => console.log('Bridge:', r)).catch(e => console.error('No bridge:', e.message))"
